description: Wire Intentra guard beside /careful: on PreToolUse (Bash), extract tool_input.command (same idea as careful/bin/check-careful.sh grep+python fallback), then POST JSON to the progress server. Does not replace careful/freeze.

env.INTENTRA_TOKEN: set when server uses bearer auth

local_helper: From repo root: bin/intentra-guard-http --command 'git push -f' (reads INTENTRA_GUARD_URL and INTENTRA_TOKEN)
